subscription.title: Subscription Plan
subscription.lead: Each workspace has its own subscription plan, billing cycle, payment methods and usage quotas.
subscription.cancelsAtPeriodEnd: Cancels at the end of the current billing period.
subscription.freeLimitTitle: This organization is limited by the included usage
subscription.freeLimitLead: Projects may become unresponsive when this organization exceeds its
subscription.freeLimitSuffix: . To scale seamlessly, upgrade to a paid plan.
subscription.checkoutSuccess: Subscription updated. It may take a moment for your plan and seat limits to refresh.
subscription.portalUnavailable: Could not open the billing portal. Try again in a moment.

invoices.title: Past Invoices
invoices.lead: You get an invoice every time you change your plan or when your monthly billing cycle resets.
invoices.empty: No invoices yet. Invoices appear after your first paid billing cycle or plan change.

paymentMethods.title: Payment Methods
paymentMethods.lead: Subscription charges use the default card. Add or remove cards and choose which one is default.

addPaymentDialog.title: Add payment method
addPaymentDialog.description: In production this step uses Stripe Elements and a Setup Intent. For the demo, use test card 4242 4242 4242 4242 or 5555 5555 5555 4444.
